subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Forgiver of sins, Remover of afflictions, and Concealer of faults, reach these two through Thy mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا غافر الذنوب و کاشف الکروب و الساتر علی العیوب ادرک برحمتک هذین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
